package rulefixtures

// scenario for repeated_map_clone_in_loop: maps.Clone or equivalent map-copy calls observed inside loops.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: hot_path; severity: info.
type Rule361NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario361Negative(records []Rule361NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
